It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
